libis.seo.site.title: Default meta title
libis.seo.site.title.help: Used as default and as an addition to page titles
libis.seo.site.description.help: This is the default description for pages without their own description
libis.seo.standard.indexing.help: A noindex does not mean the website cannot be crawled, it simply will not appear in Google. This rule can be overridden per page (by selecting 'index, follow' or 'index, nofollow').
libis.seo.title.pattern.option.title: (page title)
libis.seo.site.socialmedia.image: Default SEO image for social media
libis.seo.site.socialmedia.image.help: This image is shown if no SEO image is selected for the page. It is displayed when the page is shared on social media.
libis.seo.title: SEO page title
libis.seo.title.help: If left empty, the page title will be used.
libis.seo.description.help: This description will appear under the page name as a summary.
libis.seo.canonical.url.help: Only fill this in if this page has a different main URL.
libis.seo.socialmedia.title: Page title for social media
libis.seo.socialmedia.title.help: This title will be shown when sharing the page on social media. Leave empty to use the SEO title (or the page title if that is also empty).
